items.how_used: 论文在摘要中概述了研究背景、建模思路、主要发现和结论，包括能量传递假设、历史数据拟合、预测结果等。
items.source_excerpt: Summary Paper: Modeling the devastation of a Tsunami ... This investigation analyzed the mathematical background of shallow-water waves and established a link between the yield energy of earthquakes ...

items.how_used: 论文列出了6条假设，包括海洋深度恒定、波能不损失、地震能量全部传递到水、震源为点源等。
items.source_excerpt: Assumptions: - Depth of the ocean from epicenter is constant until beginning of sandbank is reached - The wave does not lose energy until reaching the coastline, i.e. total energy is constant. ...

items.how_used: 论文使用计算器拟合地震震级与能量之间的指数关系，得到方程 E = 19316684.22 * 24.73^x，并除以2考虑波的分裂。
items.source_excerpt: An Equation was formed using best fit line on the calculator to match the data by 99.95%. Equation for Magnitude to yield energy = 19316684.22*24.73x and this equation must be divided by two since the wave of energy will split into 2 at the fault, sending waves into either direction.

items.how_used: 论文使用了表格展示地震震级与TNT当量、能量之间的关系，并绘制了震级-能量散点图。
items.source_excerpt: Earthquake Magnitude to Wave Energy Produced: ... (table) ... Magnitude to Energy produced (graph)

items.how_used: 论文在正文中引用了多个网络资源，并在文末列出了参考文献。
论文包含一幅地图，展示了板块边界和潜在震源位置，用于说明不同城市面临的风险。
items.source_excerpt: This map shows the tectonic plates that causes earthquakes, often underwater. ...
